pr_title: Track in-flight request counts per API key for the rate limiter
pr_description: Adds increment()/decrement() helpers so the rate limiter can track how many requests are currently in flight per API key.
injected_issue: increment()/decrement() perform an unsynchronized read-modify-write (get, add/subtract, set) on a shared dict, which is a classic check-then-act race condition -- concurrent callers (this is a rate limiter, called from many request-handling threads) can interleave and lose updates.
why_tests_dont_catch_it: All three tests call increment()/decrement() sequentially from a single thread, so the read-modify-write is never actually interleaved and the missing lock never produces a wrong count.
